show_popup_new: Show popup when there is a new notification
show_popup_new_label: This setting allows displaying a popup when a new notification arrives.
show_popup_default_label: Turn on to display default popup notification.
show_popup_position_label: This setting allows you to choose the position to display the new notification popup.
show_popup_auto_close_label: This setting allows you to choose whether to automatically close the new notification popup and if so, after how many seconds it will close.
time_limit_label: This setting allows you to choose not to receive mobile notifications within the selected time range.
mode_label: Turn it off if you don't want to receive this notification.
silent_label: Turn it on if you still want to receive notifications in the notification box, but don't want to be disturbed by popups and sounds.
auto_send_mail_label: Turn it on if you want to receive an email along with this notification.
